Precondition: Both end effectors are free and box_1 is accessible on top of box_2.
Postcondition: The robot is holding box_1 with both end effectors.

Precondition: Box_1 is held by the robot and the table area right of box_2 is clear.
Postcondition: Box_1 is placed on the table to the right of box_2; both end effectors are free.

Precondition: Both end effectors are free and box_2 is accessible on the table.
Postcondition: The robot is holding box_2 with both end effectors.
